title: Peaceful Countryside Camping in Biggin
intro: Our rustic campsite sits right alongside the pub, offering peaceful countryside camping just steps from great food, real ale and one of the best views in the Peak District.
Whether you're here for a walking weekend, a cycling break or simply to get away from it all, you'll find everything you need for a comfortable stay in beautiful Derbyshire countryside.
Enjoy a day exploring the hills, then return to your pitch for an unforgettable sunset over the rolling farmland — followed by a well-earned pint in the pub.

cards.title: Walking & Cycling
items: Direct access to Peak District routes
Stunning walks straight from your pitch
Perfect base for exploring the Peaks

cards.title: On Your Doorstep
items: Large beer garden with panoramic views
Cosy pub interior for rainy days
